name: Empresa Electrica de Magallanes S.A.
summary: Empresa El√É¬©ctrica de Magallanes S.A. engages in the generation, transmission, distribution, and supply of electricity in Chile. The company also offers online payment and meter rental services. It serves approximately 57,000 customers. The company was founded in 1897 and is based in Punta Arenas, Chile.
